# Poulin Cooling A/C and Refrigeration — Full Knowledge Base

## Business Overview

Poulin Cooling A/C and Refrigeration is a licensed HVAC contractor serving Clearwater and Pinellas County, FL. We specialize in residential and commercial air conditioning repair, AC installation, heating repair, heating installation, commercial refrigeration, and indoor air quality services. Our team provides same-day service, emergency repairs, and free estimates.

## Contact Information

- **Business Name:** Poulin Cooling A/C and Refrigeration
- **Address:** 1237 South Lincoln Avenue, Ste B, Clearwater, FL 33756
- **Phone:** (727) 424-2222
- **Website:** https://poulincooling.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- **Coordinates:** 27.9521, -82.7852
- **Category:** HVAC Contractor / Air Conditioning Contractor

## Services

### Air Conditioning Repair
Diagnosis and repair of all AC system failures including compressor issues, refrigerant leaks, frozen coils, electrical faults, and thermostat problems. Same-day service available.

### Air Conditioning Installation
Professional installation of new central AC systems, ductless mini-splits, and heat pumps for residential and commercial properties. Includes load calculations and free estimates.

### Air Conditioning Maintenance
Seasonal tune-ups and preventive maintenance to extend equipment life, improve efficiency, and prevent breakdowns. Maintenance plans available.

### Heating Repair
Repair of furnaces, heat pumps, and electric heating systems. Emergency heating repair available.

### Heating Installation
Installation of new heating systems including furnaces, heat pumps, and electric heaters for homes and businesses.

### Heating Maintenance
Seasonal heating system inspections and tune-ups to ensure safe and efficient operation.

### Commercial Refrigeration Repair
Service and repair of commercial refrigeration equipment including walk-in coolers, freezers, display cases, and refrigeration systems for restaurants, grocery stores, and food service businesses.

### Indoor Air Quality Services
Solutions for improving indoor air quality including air purifiers, UV light systems, air filtration, humidity control, and ventilation improvements.

### Residential AC Services
Complete HVAC services for homeowners including repair, installation, maintenance, and indoor air quality for single-family homes, condos, and townhouses.

### Commercial AC Services
Full-service HVAC solutions for commercial buildings, offices, retail spaces, restaurants, and industrial facilities.
